name: dudu
description: Layered VC due-diligence skills: auto-diligence (full e2e from a company name), background-check (L1 cheap public-source) and pmf-signal (L2 deep claim ledger × verdict matrix), plus founder-check, market-context, competitive-landscape, market-sizing, standalone customer-debrief, fleet-run for fleet-scale orchestration, and place-call for delegating one outbound voice call via callagent.

interface.shortDescription: Layered VC due-diligence workflow with calibrated claim verification
interface.longDescription: Run layered diligence on a deal: Layer 1 background-check (founder + market context + competitive + sizing — cheap, public-source) and Layer 2 pmf-signal (the unique deliverable: claim ledger × verdict matrix from N=15–200 grounded persona simulation, plus warm-path outreach). Standalone customer-debrief synthesizes real interview transcripts. fleet-run composes those layers across many deals at once with concurrency caps and a sortable cross-deal dashboard. auto-diligence is the single-trigger entry point: from just a company name it auto-discovers founders + pitch and runs the full chain through to report.html with embedded interview audio. Each skill produces a citation-backed markdown artifact under deals/<slug>/.
defaultPrompt: Run dudu:auto-diligence on <Company Name> — I just want the report.
I'm evaluating a new deal. Run dudu:background-check followed by dudu:pmf-signal on it.
Run dudu:founder-check on the founders of this company.
I have N startups to triage. Run dudu:fleet-run on them and render the dashboard.
